nasb.text: Other seed fell on rocky soil, and as soon as it grew up, it withered away, because it had no moisture.

esv.text: And some fell on the rock, and as it grew up, it withered away, because it had no moisture.

cnv.text: 有的落在石頭地上，一長出來就枯萎了，因為得不著滋潤。

ccb.text: 有些落在盖着浅土的石头地上，因水分不足，幼苗刚长出来就枯萎了；

csbs.text: 有的落在岩石上，一长出来就枯萎了，因为得不到水份。
